Petition To Determine Title To And Require Transfer Of Personal Property.
Off Calendar Jul-27-2007 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Joshua Whitehair appearing for respondent Bank of America. Debbie Kinney appearing for and with petitioner Forest. The Bank will turn over the unredacted record. They are not willing to take action to recover the funds. Court wanted the Bank to turn over infomation on Bertha Parsini. Petition is granted. Ms. Kinney will revise the order.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Gena Eales CSR# 9176. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Rob Harris.
